root_text.sn48.2:1.4: Yato kho, bhikkhave, ariyasāvako imesaṁ pañcannaṁ indriyānaṁ assādañca ādīnavañca nissaraṇañca yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti—
root_text.sn48.2:1.5: ayaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, ariyasāvako sotāpanno avinipātadhammo niyato sambodhiparāyaṇo”ti.

translation_text.sn48.2:1.3: The faculties of faith, energy, mindfulness, immersion, and wisdom.
translation_text.sn48.2:1.4: A noble disciple comes to truly understand these five faculties’ gratification, drawback, and escape.
translation_text.sn48.2:1.5: Such a noble disciple is called a stream-enterer, not liable to be reborn in the underworld, destined for awakening.”

variant_text.sn48.2:1.4: imesaṁ pañcannaṁ indriyānaṁ assādañca → samudayañca atthaṅgamañca assādañca (sya-all, km, pts1ed, mr)
